Comment: Super easy and fun class, my favorite class of the semester. There were readings every week that were super interesting but weren't required. Watched a new show/movie every class and the final is making a queer/mash-up video. Super fun I highly recommend.

Prof. Martin is the best professors I've had at UM. I took his History of Television course back when it was under special topics. He genuinely is an amazing teacher, he's hilarious and engaging and teaches the course through a comprehensive, multi-dimensional lens. My only complaint is that his coursework was a little writing heavy.
